name: Netherlands
style_of_play: Structured 4-3-3 with disciplined defensive shape and controlled build-up through the center.
tactical_summary: Build from the back with center-backs stepping into midfield; wing-backs provide the primary width while the front three rotate and combine in the half-spaces.
why_it_matters: Netherlands' compact defensive structure makes them difficult to break down in group-stage and knockout scenarios.
injury_news: Placeholder — monitor key midfielder availability closer to the tournament.
